note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Sacral region wound site, rates 4/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Stage 2 pressure ulcer Sacral region measures 3.5 cm x 3.4 cm x 0.3 cm.
  Wound bed: 56% slough, 44% granulation tissue. Periwound: macerated.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: none.
Assessment: Stage 2 pressure ulcer Sacral region — not improving.
Plan: Debridement consult ordered. Physician notified of wound progression.
